About

The
Story

I am Norma Mkhize — an image and brand strategist with a flair for turning brands into magic and small to medium businesses into gold.

My mission is to create content and tell stories which are yet to be seen, heard and discovered. A story told in color, voice, and feeling — until a name becomes more than a name… it becomes a memory people carry.

Based in Durban, South Africa. Open to relocate. Available for remote work globally.
